description: Create a digital sewing pattern for a canvas tote bag in LibreCAD. The pattern must include three layers: 'STITCH_LINE' (White/7), 'SEAM_ALLOWANCE' (Red/1), and 'FOLD_LINE' (Cyan/4). On the 'STITCH_LINE' layer, draw the bag body as a 350mm wide by 400mm high rectangle with the bottom-left corner at (100, 100) and 30mm chamfers on the two bottom corners. On the 'SEAM_ALLOWANCE' layer, create a 15mm offset outside the entire bag body shape. On the 'FOLD_LINE' layer, include a horizontal hem line 40mm below the top edge of the finished body. Save the drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/tote_bag_pattern.dxf.
